seasonality: NEAR fee revenue is event-driven, spiking around AI-agent narrative cycles (Q4 2024) and memecoin activity on Hot Wallet/Ref Finance, but lacks consistent seasonal patterns.
rationale: DefiLlama reports NEAR TVL near $195M as of mid-2025, down from ~$300M peak in late 2024. Annualized protocol fees are estimated at ~$3.2M based on DefiLlama's trailing 30-day fee data (~$267K/month × 12); at a ~$455M fully diluted market cap this implies a P/S of roughly 142x, elevated versus Solana (~45x) but in line with other L1s with thin fee capture. Real yield to stakers is effectively null because nearly all validator rewards are inflationary (~8.5% APR from token issuance) rather than fee-derived — protocol fees are largely burned or go to the treasury, leaving stakers with minimal real (fee-backed) yield.
